Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionVariable
Enclosing class:
ExecutionNodeReader
public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement implements IExecutionVariable
An implementation of IExecutionVariable which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

    Creates recursive a term which can be used to determine the value of IExecutionVariable.getProgramVariable().

    Returns the optional additional condition considered during value computation.

    Returns the index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.

    Returns the human readable index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.

      Returns the index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.
      Specified by:
      getArrayIndex in interface IExecutionVariable
      Returns:
      The index in the parent array or null if no array cell value is represented.

      The human readable index in the parent array or null if no array cell value is represented.

    • isArrayIndex

      public boolean isArrayIndex()
      Checks if the current value is part of a parent array.
      Specified by:
      isArrayIndex in interface IExecutionVariable
      Returns:
      true is array cell value, false is a "normal" value.
